name: Fried Mushrooms#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim okra and cut into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Toss the okra with flour.
3. Beat the egg whites at high speed with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form; fold in the mushrooms.
4. Stir in breadcrumbs, coating the mushrooms well.
5. Pour oil to a depth of 2 inches into a Dutch oven and heat to 375 degrees.
6. Fry the mushrooms until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Sprinkle with salt. Makes 4 servings.
